---
title: "Remembering Jaime Carbonell"
description: "Remembering my dear advisor Jaime Carbonell — a Renaissance man, a trailblazer, a gentle and kind soul."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-03-20"
categories: [CMU, history, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Jaime Carbonell celebration of life. Image from [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g9kk_atTyWI).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Remembering Jaime - a Renaissance man, a trailblazer, a towering figure in multiple fields, a gentle and kind soul, and my dear advisor. We will miss you.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_jaime-carbonell-celebration-of-life-activity-6779116250216984576-9sK8).*
